---
title: "TOPICS Book"
author: "bignumber-material"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
---

# Introduction

This Bookdown project uses the markdown sources under `../_TOPICS` without moving them. The generated HTML book is built from `_BOOK` and can be rendered with `bookdown::render_book("index.Rmd", "bookdown::html_book")`.

# About

The chapters are sourced from topic folders in `_TOPICS`. Each file is referenced by relative path from this `_BOOK` folder.
